texto: It was all I could do to keep from lunging across the table and pressing my shuttering lips against his burning flesh. My palms were sweating profusely causing me to have to wipe them against my jeans under the table. Those last few seconds had felt like a lifetime in pause.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jennifer L. Brown: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “It was all I could do to keep from lunging across the table and pressing my shuttering lips again…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, fantasy, realistic pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de realistic e science-fiction.

frase_original: It was all I could do to keep from lunging across the table and pressing my shuttering lips against his burning flesh. My palms were sweating profusely causing me to have to wipe them against my jeans under the table. Those last few seconds had felt like a lifetime in pause.
